ruleBookInfo.tocUrl:
<js>if (result.match(/href="(\/chapter\?.*?)"/)){var murl = /href="(\/chapter\?.*?)"/g;
var match;
var listurl = [];
while ((match = murl.exec(result)) != null) {
listurl.push(String(match[1]).replace(/\\/g,''))};
var i=Math.floor(Math.random() * 10);
'https://www.owlook.com.cn'+listurl[i]
}else{baseUrl}</js>
